# Phase 1 Design Package

This directory indexes the clean-room MVP specification and architecture package.

## Deliverables

- [MVP Product Spec](../specs/mvp-product-spec.md)
- [MVP Architecture](../architecture/mvp-architecture.md)
- [Tool and Permission Spec](../specs/tool-and-permission-spec.md)
- [Repository Blueprint](../architecture/repository-blueprint.md)

## Phase 1 Goal

Prepare enough product and architecture definition to open a new empty clean-room repository without copying old implementation code.

## Recommended Next Action

Create a new repository from an empty initial commit and copy only these planning documents plus the Phase 0 provenance/security documents.

Do not copy old `src`, old tests, old package metadata, old source maps, or old generated artifacts.
